name: obs-wiki
description: obs-wiki stewards an Obsidian vault through Codex-native knowledge workflows.

interface.shortDescription: A Codex-native steward for Obsidian vaults
interface.longDescription: Use obs-wiki to steward the active Obsidian vault through init, ingest, query, lint, refine, and distill workflows without creating a second raw/wiki system outside the vault.
defaultPrompt: Initialize my active Obsidian vault as an obs-wiki knowledge system
Query my active vault and build a focused context pack before answering
Lint or refine my active vault without creating an external wiki
